questions.question: As of 28 March 2025, approximately how many farmer IDs have been generated under the Digital Agriculture Mission in India?

Which was the new scheme announced during Budget 2025-26 that targets 100 low-productivity districts and focuses on enhancing agricultural productivity, crop diversification, sustainable practices, irrigation and post-harvest storage?

Which of the following statements regarding the National Mission on Edible Oils - Oil Palm (NMEO-OP) is/are correct? 1. A new Centrally Sponsored Scheme, namely, National Mission on Edible Oils - Oil Palm (NMEO-OP) was launched by the Government of India in 2021. 2. It aims to promote oil palm cultivation for making the country Aatma Nirbhar in edible oils with special focus on North-Eastern States and A&N Islands. 3. The Mission aims to bring additional area of 6.5 lakh ha under Oil Palm plantation in the next 5 years, from 2025-26 to 2030-31.
In 2024, India became the world's top milk producer with a production of 239 million metric tons. Which government initiative significantly contributed to this achievement?
As of February 2025, how many Khelo India Centres have been established across India for training athletes?
What is the primary objective of the NPS Vatsalya scheme launched in 2024?
questions.option_1: To replace the existing National Pension System (NPS) for all age groups
questions.option_2: To offer a savings-cum-pension plan exclusively for minors
questions.option_3: To provide old-age pension to senior citizens living in rural areas
questions.option_4: To support pension benefits for unorganised sector workers

questions.question: Which of the following programmes received the highest score in the Data Governance Quality Index (DGQI) for the Department of Rural Development for the year 2023-24?
questions.option_1: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana

questions.question: In February 2025, the Ministry of Corporate Affairs extended the deadline for private companies to dematerialise their securities. What is the new deadline?​

Which of the following statements is/are correct about the Digital Agriculture Mission launched in 2024? It includes the creation of Digital Public Infrastructure such asAgriStackand Comprehensive Soil Fertility Maps.AgriStackis managed solely by the Central Government. The mission seeks to facilitate digital services like credit and insurance to farmers through authenticated data.
In which year did the government of India launch the Aatma Nirbhar Bharat Campaign?
In January 2025, India mourned the loss of Dr K.S. Manilal, a pioneering scientist in which of the following fields?
What was the Infant Mortality Rate (IMR) in India according to the Sample Registration System (SRS), 2019?
What was the life expectancy at birth in India as per the 2021 World Health Organization data?
In February 2025, the Indian government imposed a ban on the manufacture and export of which two opioid drugs due to concerns over their misuse and associated health risks in West African countries?​
As of March 2025, the National TB Elimination Programme (NTEP), under the aegis of National Health Mission (NHM), is implemented for how many days in India?
In which year was the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY), a flagship mission aimed at addressing the urban housing shortage in India, launched?
What is the target number of houses to be built under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) by 2023-2024?
Who among the following is NOT eligible for the subsidy under the PMAY-U 2.0 scheme launched in 2024?
questions.option_1: Families given housing by any government scheme in the past 20 years
questions.option_2: Individuals with annual income up to ₹6 lakh
questions.option_4: Middle Income Groups (MIG) having an annual income of up to ₹9 lakh per year

questions.question: As of February 2025, how many athletes trained under Khelo India have set international records?
In March 2025, the theme of the 54ᵗʰ National Safety Week focused on which of the following?
questions.option_4: Safety & Well-being Crucial for Viksit Bharat

questions.question: Which of the following statements related to the One Nation One Subscription (ONOS) scheme launched in 2024 is/are correct? Statement 1: The ONOS scheme aims to provide digital access to over 13,000 international journals for research institutions across India. Statement 2: INFLIBNET(Information and Library Network) is responsible for managing financial transactions related to the subscription charges of these journals.
In November 2024, NITI Aayog launched the 'Accelerating Sustainable State Energy Transition (ASSET)' initiative. What is the primary objective of this initiative?​
questions.option_1: To develop nuclear energy infrastructure across states
questions.option_2: To enhance energy efficiency in industrial sectors
questions.option_3: To promote electric vehicle adoption in urban areas
questions.option_4: To support states in achieving their renewable energy targets

questions.question: Which of the following statements about the National Mission on Natural Farming (NMNF), launched in 2024, is/are correct? 1. The total approved outlay of NMNF till 2025-26 is ₹1,000 crore. 2. The mission supports the establishment of Bio-input Resource Centres for providing Natural Farming inputs.

Which of the following statements about the National Mission on Natural Farming (NMNF), launched in 2024, is/are correct? NMNF aims to reach 1 crore farmers and cover 7.5 lakh ha. Model Demonstration Farms will be set up only at Agricultural Universities. Natural Farming practices aim to reduce dependency on externally purchased inputs. It is a Central Sector Scheme under the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare.
What are the names of the venues where the Khelo India Para Games (KIPG) 2025 was held?
questions.option_1: Jawaharlal Nehru Indoor Stadium, Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium, and Talkatora Stadium
questions.option_2: Jawaharlal Nehru Indoor Stadium and Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium
questions.option_3: Major Dhyan Chand National Stadium, Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium, and Dr Karni Singh Shooting Range
questions.option_4: Jawaharlal Nehru Indoor Stadium, Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium, and Dr Karni Singh Shooting Range
